mission.title: alertmanager: Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts
mission.description: Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current alertmanager deployment
steps.description:
Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
helm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working alertmanager installation.

steps.title: Review alertmanager configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager
```
OpsGenie deduplicate messages based on the Alert [alias](https://docs.opsgenie.com/docs/alert-api#section-create-alert).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts
steps.description:
Using `external_labels` is the right thing to do here.
```yaml
alert: KubeCPUOvercommit
expr: sum(kube_resourcequota{job="kube-state-metrics",resource="requests.cpu",type="hard"})
  / sum(node:node_num_cpu:sum) > 1.5
for: 5m
labels:
  severity: warning
annotations:
  message: Overcommited CPU resource request quota on Namespaces.
  runbook_url: https://github.com/kubernetes-monitoring/kubernetes-mixin/tree/master/runbook.md#alert-name-kubecpuovercommit
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add option to customize alias field for opsgenie alerts" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Using `external_labels` is the right thing to do here.
codeSnippets:
alert: KubeCPUOvercommit
expr: sum(kube_resourcequota{job="kube-state-metrics",resource="requests.cpu",type="hard"})
  / sum(node:node_num_cpu:sum) > 1.5
for: 5m
labels:
  severity: warning
annotations:
  message: Overcommited CPU resource request quota on Namespaces.
  runbook_url: https://github.com/kubernetes-monitoring/kubernetes-mixin/tree/master/runbook.md#alert-name-kubecpuovercommit

route:
  group_by: ['service', 'severity', 'alertname']
  group_wait: 30s
  group_interval: 2m
  repeat_interval: 5m
  receiver: opsgenie

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with alertmanager installed or the issue environment reproducible.
